name: Fennel and peach salad
intro: This pretty fennel and peach salad from the French Riviera makes a refreshing appetizer on a hot summer’s day. For a meat-free version of this recipe, replace the ham with shavings of Parmesan cheese.

ingredients.item: small fennel bulbs, trimmed at the bottom and very thinly sliced
juice and finely grated zest of ½ lemon
salt and freshly ground black pepper
ripe peaches or nectarines, halved, cored, and sliced
of cured ham about ¼ in/5mm thick, such as prosciutto crudo, Serrano, or smoked ham, diced

method: In a shallow bowl, toss the fennel with the lemon juice and zest, oil, and a little salt. Add the peaches or nectarines, sprinkle over half the herbs, and season with pepper. Toss lightly.
Arrange on a serving plate. Scatter the ham and the remaining herbs over top. Serve immediately.
